signals.reasoning: BTC is already in a long-liquidation flush, so I would not chase a fresh short into the first dump leg.
ETH is also already flushing and no longer offers a clean fresh edge in either direction right here.
SOL is one of the cleaner reduced-size shorts because price is down more than 3% while open interest is still rising, which suggests fresh shorts are still pressing.
SPX remains a valid momentum short because the dump is now confirmed and open interest is still building, which suggests the selloff is not fully exhausted yet.
VVV is one of the clearest fades because it is still up on the day despite the broader dump, which makes it vulnerable if the market continues to unwind.
FARTCOIN still looks shortable on a reduced-size basis because it is holding up too well after the coordinated selloff, even though the setup is less clean than VVV.
PENGU is middling and not showing enough structure or crowding to justify a fresh directional trade.
MOODENG is already down hard and too low-liquidity to trust for a fresh short chase.
VIRTUAL is weak, but not in a way that creates a clean enough new entry versus just waiting for a bounce.
ZEREBRO is already deep into a flush and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh position.
TON remains one of the best reduced-size shorts because it is still materially green on the day after the broader selloff, which leaves it exposed to a catch-down move.
